title: Remaining TUI overlay components (ModelPicker, ModePicker, NotificationBar, AskUserQuestion dialog)
description:
Deferred from #515. Overlay plumbing shipped in b9e13aa (trait + ActiveOverlay enum + centered_rect helper + HelpOverlay + LogSelector). Each remaining component is a single-file addition under src/tui/components/ + one new ActiveOverlay variant.

## Components
- **ModelPicker**: interactive list of available models with effort preview. Opened via /model with no args. Up/Down + Enter; source the list from the configured providers.
- **ModePicker**: behavioral-mode switcher. Opened via /mode with no args. Mirrors ModelPicker shape.
- **NotificationBar**: transient bottom-of-screen status ribbon for non-modal events (rate-limit warnings, tool gate denials, memory-saved confirmations). Auto-dismiss after ~3 s.
- **AskUserQuestion dialog**: rich version of the tool-level prompt now surfaced as plain system messages. Hooks into the existing ask_user_question tool result — intercepts the USER_QUESTION_MARKER payload and renders the question(s) with multi-select support (crosslink #509 parity).

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/components/ModelPicker.tsx
- /home/doll/claude-code/tools/AskUserQuestionTool/AskUserQuestionTool.tsx
- src/tui/components/ (existing examples)
